summary: Car price prediction app with photo upload feature for price prediction.

existing_features.title: Add a photo upload field to the car price prediction form (PredictionForm.tsx) that allows users to attach one or more car detail photos (e.g., exterior, interior, dashboard) before submitting for price prediction. The uploaded images should be previewed inline within the form before submission.
Update the prediction history view to display thumbnail photos associated with each past prediction, if photos were provided at submission time.
Update the useQueries.ts mutation for car price prediction to pass the selected photo data (base64 strings array) to the backend actor call alongside existing car spec fields.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add photo upload feature to include car detail photos when predicting price

Store uploaded car photo data (as base64-encoded blobs) alongside the car specification fields in the backend prediction record. Update the CarSpecs or prediction type in backend/main.mo to include an optional photos field (array of blob or text), and update the savePrediction / predictPrice backend function to accept and persist photo data.
